overall.description: A first-person exploration of a luxurious, dimly lit futuristic apartment from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera slowly moves through the space, examining objects on a desk including an Arasaka bag, a green bottle, and documents, before panning to reveal a platform bed and a large aquarium screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment entry with central desk

agents.ego_description: approaching the desk and examining the items placed on its surface

entered.detail: massive wall screen displaying underwater scene with coral and fish
sleek dark desk with metallic trim and ambient lighting
tall green glass bottle with condensation droplets
gray duffel bag with white Arasaka corporation logo

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit luxury apartment and approaches a modern desk. An Arasaka duffel bag and green bottle sit on the desk surface, while a large screen displaying an underwater scene glows on the right wall.

events.description: camera shifts focus from the bag to a book with hexagonal pattern on the desk
camera moves around the desk revealing the platform bed in the background

agents.ego_description: closely examining the book and handwritten documents spread across the desk

entered.detail: large book or tablet with glowing hexagonal grid pattern on cover
papers with handwritten text and diagrams scattered on desk
low modern bed with white linens and glass frame
black and gold cylindrical candles on desk corners

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on a book with a hexagonal design and handwritten documents spread across the desk. The Arasaka bag moves to the left of frame as the viewpoint shifts right, revealing a platform bed in the distant background.

events.description: camera focuses on textured candle holder with dramatic side lighting highlighting the surface detail

agents.ego_description: moving around the desk to examine different objects and the room layout

entered.detail: continuous LED strip lighting along the base of the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the desk, revealing decorative candles and handwritten notes. The platform bed becomes more prominent in the center of the frame as ambient floor lighting appears along the right wall.

events.description: camera moves toward the back of the room focusing on the platform bed and large aquarium screen

agents.ego_description: moving toward the bed and panning to show the room's full layout including the ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the platform bed and the large aquarium screen that dominates the back wall. The desk and its items recede into the background right as the viewpoint settles on the bed and the glowing aquatic display.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit luxury apartment that shifts from a detailed study of a workspace to a wide view of a futuristic bedroom. It begins by approaching a modern desk where an Arasaka duffel bag and a green bottle sit beneath the glow of a large underwater screen on the right wall. As the viewpoint shifts right, the camera focuses on a hexagonal book and handwritten documents, causing the bag to slide out of frame while a platform bed emerges in the distant background. The scene then expands as the camera circles the desk to reveal decorative candles and notes, allowing ambient floor lighting to illuminate the right wall as the bed moves into the center of the frame. Finally, the camera glides toward the platform bed and the massive aquarium screen dominating the back wall, leaving the desk and its contents to recede into the background.
